title: Roadmap: LLM prose-heal tier for adopted doc copies (subscription, opt-in)
context: Adopted copies heal deterministically (re-pin + correction callouts) — the stale prose itself stays visible below the correction. dec_a2899939d9 deferred an LLM rewrite tier: 'could layer on later behind the existing draftProse pattern'.
decision: Optional --prose-heal on hunch wiki: rewrite the adopted copy's stale sections toward the current decision via SynthProvider.draftProse (subscription-only, template fallback), keeping the deterministic corrections as the ground truth around it.
